RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. Attorney Reckas submits proof of notification of continuance in this matter and represents that he notified Respondent of his appearance today; Court accepts notice. A R G U E D. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
PETITIONER NICHOLAS PANOUTSOPOULOS AND EKATERINE PANOUTSOPOULOS Petition To Compel Arbitration Of Equitable Issues: DENIED. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration And Order Appointing Neutral Arbitrator
Off Calendar Apr-26-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Nick T. Reckas, Esq. (415) 464-0913 for Petitioner and Moving Party Panoutsopoulos
Denise E. Chambliss, Esq., Law Offices of Doyle & Associates (925) 935-3555 Specially Appearing for Defendant and Opposing Party Karsant
RULING:
A R G U E D; PETITIONER NICHOLAS PANOUTSOPOULOS and EKATERINE PANOUTSOPOULOS' Petition To Compel Arbitration And Order Appointing Neutral Arbitrator: If Counsel enter into the proposed Stipulation re arbitration, the language of the stipulation would preclude the determination by the Court of a prevailing party. Petitioner's Counsel represents a dismissal will be filed as to Dr. Peter Karsant. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
